title: Christ Arose

metadata.copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2007 Revision.
c_lines: Words: Robert Lowry, 1874.  Music and Setting: 'Christ Arose' Robert Lowry, 1874.
copyright: public domain.  This score is a part of the Open Hymnal Project, 2007 Revision.

1.raw_text: Low in the grave He lay Jesus my Savior! Waiting the coming day\- Jesus my Lord! Up from the grave He arose, With a mighty triumph o'er His foes; He arose a Victor from the dark domain, And He lives forever with His saints to reign. He arose! He arose! Hallelujah! Christ arose!

2.raw_text: Vainly they watch His bed\- Jesus my Savior! Vainly they seal the dead\- Jesus my Lord! foes; He arose a Victor from the dark domain, And He lives forever with His saints to reign. He arose! He arose! Hallelujah! Christ arose!

3.raw_text: Death cannot keep his prey\- Jesus my Savior! He tore the bars away\- Jesus my Lord! foes; He arose a Victor from the dark domain, And He lives forever with His saints to reign. He arose! He arose! Hallelujah! Christ arose!
